candidate_grid.selection: Minimum validation binary log loss; an exact tie selects the larger L2 value.

evaluation.conflict_resolution: At one condition decision, choose the passing Up or Down action with the larger probability. Exact probability ties abstain.
evaluation.failed_exit: Charge the full entry cost, record a failed-exit event, and block the condition permanently.
evaluation.no_fill_release: Release the condition only at the recorded entry execution-confirmation receipt.
evaluation.position_state: At most one bot-owned position or unresolved entry attempt per condition.
evaluation.realized_pnl_clock: Recognize complete round-trip PnL at exit receipt and conservative failed-exit loss at the latest locally known execution event. Report realized-only drawdown explicitly.
evaluation.threshold_gate: Validation requires at least 30 completed round trips overall and five per asset, positive aggregate stress utility, positive median selected-market PnL, and zero filled-entry/failed-exit events. Select the greatest Wilson 95% lower bound for positive-complete precision; an exact tie selects the higher threshold. Otherwise select no_trade.
evaluation.test_once: After L2 and threshold selection are frozen from validation, evaluate the untouched test partition exactly once. Test results cannot alter the model or threshold.

fit.convergence: A non-finite objective, non-finite parameter, optimizer failure, or iteration-limit termination invalidates that candidate; it is never silently accepted.
fit.initialization: All standardized feature weights and the intercept start at zero.
fit.objective: Mean binary log loss plus 0.5 * L2 * squared L2 norm of standardized feature weights. The intercept is not regularized.
fit.optimizer: SciPy L-BFGS-B with an analytic gradient, maxiter=500, ftol=1e-12, and gtol=1e-8.
fit.preprocessing: For each feature, subtract the training-only arithmetic mean and divide by the training-only population standard deviation. Replace a non-finite or <=1e-12 standard deviation with 1. Validation and test never refit preprocessing.
fit.probability: Stable logistic sigmoid clipped only for log-loss evaluation to [1e-12, 1-1e-12].

split.allocation: For N sorted eligible synchronized groups, validation_count=floor(0.2*N), test_count=floor(0.2*N), one group is purged before validation and one before test, and every earlier group is training. N must be at least 30 and every retained partition must be nonempty.
split.group: Exact five-minute event_start_ms shared by BTC, ETH, and SOL; all conditions, decisions, and both action orientations remain together.
split.outcome_breadth: After the split is frozen, each retained partition must contain official Up and Down market outcomes for every asset. Outcomes validate breadth only and are never features.
split.training_label: positive_complete for classifier-eligible action paths. action_unavailable rows are excluded; entry_no_fill and filled_entry_failed_exit remain eligible negatives.
split.training_preconditions: At least 30 hash-bound continuity-eligible groups, both target classes in training, finite 39-wide features, exact source/action hashes, and complete official outcomes. Failure selects insufficient_evidence without fitting.
